Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests

Class XProverTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests.XProverTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
XProverInputTests, XProverReasonerTests
public abstract class XProverTests extends Object
Base class for tests of the XProver extension to the sequent prover.

Provides various utility methods for writing tests.
